display.purpose: Home page hero only. Never on authenticated surfaces.

headline.purpose: Page titles, section headers, dialog titles.

body.purpose: All body text, descriptions, table cells. Max 65-75ch line length.

mono.purpose: Numerical data in tables, code, crypto values.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Cards and interactive elements on hover.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and modals. Strong depth separation.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Quick state changes (button hover, focus ring).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Muted Violet-Indigo with white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7c5cbf; color: #f5f3fc; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6b4eaa; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c5cbf; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Subtle button for secondary actions. Transparent at rest, tinted on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #3b3658; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(124,92,191,0.1); color: #7c5cbf; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c5cbf; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Danger action button. Red-orange for delete/remove operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: #c44830; color: #f5f3fc; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #a83c28; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c44830; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input. Flat border, primary ring on focus.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="กรอกข้อมูล..." />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #f5f3fc; color: #3b3658; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #c8c2d8; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; height: 40px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6d6590; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #7c5cbf; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(124,92,191,0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card Surface
components.description: Standard card container. Flat at rest, shadow on hover.
components.html:
รายงานประจำเดือน

สรุปข้อมูลเดือนนี้

เนื้อหา
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; color: #3b3658; border: 1px solid #c8c2d8; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(99,102,241,0.05); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(30,27,75,0.08), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(30,27,75,0.04); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 14px; color: #6d6590; margin: 0; } .ds-card-content { padding: 0 24px 24px; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky frosted-glass header with logo, nav links, and theme toggle.
components.html:
BunLINET3
Dashboard รายจ่าย
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; height: 56px; background: rgba(245,243,252,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid #c8c2d8; } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 16px; height: 100%; } .ds-nav-logo { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-logo-bun { color: #3b3658; } .ds-nav-logo-line { color: #07b53b; } .ds-nav-logo-t3 { color: #9070d0; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; color: #6d6590; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(124,92,191,0.1); color: #7c5cbf; } .ds-nav-link-active { background: rgba(124,92,191,0.1); color: #7c5cbf; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact status indicator. Rounded-full with semantic color.
components.html: อนุมัติแล้ว
components.css: .ds-badge { font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.025em; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; } .ds-badge-success { background: #dcfce7; color: #059669; }

components.name: LINE Login Button
components.description: Official LINE Login button following brand guidelines. Green background with layered hover states.
components.css: .ds-line-login { position: relative; background: #06C755; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; transition: opacity 100ms; } .ds-line-login-base { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #06C755; } .ds-line-login-hover { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0); transition: background 100ms; } .ds-line-login:hover .ds-line-login-hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-line-login:active .ds-line-login-hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-line-login-divider { position: absolute; left: 44px; top: 10px; bottom: 10px; width: 1px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-line-login-content { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 20px 10px 12px; } .ds-line-login-text { font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

narrative.overview:
A clean, organized workspace where everything has its place. Like a well-kept desk with labeled trays, a pen in its holder, and a calendar within arm's reach. The interface respects your attention by being where you need it, when you need it, and getting out of the way otherwise.

The system is Thai-first: Noto Sans Thai is the body typeface, all spacing is tested against Thai script's taller x-height and wider glyphs, and every label is in Thai. Dark and light modes are both first-class citizens with independent OKLCH token sets tuned for each environment.

This system explicitly rejects: generic SaaS dashboards with hero-metric cards and gradient accents, crypto-native dark UIs with neon colors, overly playful internal tools, and anything that takes more than two clicks for a simple task.
keyCharacteristics: Flat-by-default surfaces; shadows appear on state, not at rest
Muted Violet-Indigo primary with tinted neutrals
Dual-theme (light and dark) with independent token tuning

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Muted Violet-Indigo is used on interactive elements only: buttons, active states, focus rings. It appears on less than 10% of any given screen. Its rarity makes it meaningful.

rules.name: The LINE Green Rule
rules.body: LINE Green (#07b53b) is reserved for LINE-branded contexts exclusively. It is never used as a generic success color or UI accent.

rules.name: The Thai-First Rule
rules.body: All spacing, line heights, and padding are tested against Thai script first. Thai glyphs are taller and wider than Latin equivalents. If a layout works for Thai, it works for English.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only on state change (hover, focus, modal open). If a card casts a shadow without interaction, remove it.

dos: Do use Noto Sans Thai as the default body font for all UI text.
Do use Muted Violet-Indigo sparingly. Less than 10% of any screen surface.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest. Shadows appear on hover, focus, and modals only.
Do use the category color system for data views to create quick visual scanning.
Do use rounded-xl (12px) for cards, rounded-md (6px) for buttons and inputs, rounded-full for badges and avatars.
Do support both light and dark modes as first-class citizens.
Do use Thai for all user-facing labels, navigation, and error messages.
donts: Don't use hero-metric cards with big numbers, small labels, and gradient accents.
Don't use LINE Green (#07b53b) as a generic success color outside LINE-branded contexts.
Don't add shadows to cards or containers at rest.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right greater than 1px) as colored accents.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default pattern.
Don't use neon colors or crypto-native dark UI aesthetics.
Don't create identical card grids with same icon + heading + text repeated.
Don't use modals as the first solution for displaying information.
